message:
test(fcp-core): add property tests for provenance merge invariants (1n78.8)

Add 10 randomized property tests using rand crate with deterministic seed
for reproducibility. Tests verify:
- Merge commutativity (order independence)
- Merge associativity (grouping independence)
- Integrity MIN rule (conservative merge)
- Confidentiality MAX rule (restrictive merge)
- Taint accumulation (OR semantics)
- Single input identity preservation
- Empty input zone defaults
- TaintFlags merge algebraic properties

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
